merged_events.event_description: Embassy Bissau was established with Dean Curran as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Embassy Bissau was established on June 30, 1976, with Dean Curran as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

merged_events.event_description: Embassy Bissau suspended operations following the start of civil war in Guinea-Bissau.

evidence.quote: Embassy Bissau suspended operations on June 14, 1998, following the start of civil war in Guinea-Bissau. The U.S. Ambassador to Senegal subsequently handled relations with Guinea-Bissau.

merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Ambassador to Senegal, Richard Allen Roth, was accredited to Guinea-Bissau, presenting credentials to President Kumba Yala.

evidence.quote: The U.S. Ambassador to Senegal, Richard Allen Roth was accredited to Guinea-Bissau on February 13, 2003, when he presented his credentials to President Kumba Yala.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record Embassy established on 1976-06-30.
Perfect match. Both record suspension of operations (None) on 1998-06-14 due to civil war.
Perfect match. Both record Ambassador Nonresident status on 2003-02-13 when U.S. Ambassador to Senegal was accredited to Guinea-Bissau.
